para_trans: Department of Tourism and Cultural Affairs
Government Decision No: RASANSMA-2023 / P.No.310 / E-68373 / SC-3
Gagangarh Fort, Ta. Gaganbawda, District Kolhapur declared as a State Protected Monument
Manager, Government Interim as the due process has been completed
The Press, Charni Road, Mumbai is under the direction of the Government of India.
The accompanying final notification is in English in the Government of Maharashtra Public Gazette, Part-IV.
The 30 copies of the final notification have been sent to the Secretary, Department of Cultural Affairs, Ministry of Culture, Mumbai, Directorate of Archaeological Museums, Maharashtra State, Mumbai.
02. Copy of the final notification by the Director, Directorate of Archaeological Museums.
Arrangements should be made for a place near the memorial.
This Government decision is available on the Government of Maharashtra's www.maharashtra.gov.inय website.
